Workload: 100%
SAP Developer
SAP Developer
Workload: 100%
Location: Losone / Meyrin or Biel
Job type: Fixed term
Your tasks
Develop, enhance, and maintain SAP ABAP programs, reports, interfaces, conversions, enhancements, forms, and workflows
Design and implement custom solutions for Finance (FI/CO), Logistics (MM/SD), and Production (PP/QM) modules
Create technical specifications based on functional requirements
Perform code reviews, debugging, and performance optimization
Create and maintain comprehensive technical documentation for all developments and customizations
Collaborate with functional consultants and business stakeholders
At least 5 years of hands-on SAP ABAP development experience
Proven track record of delivering SAP projects across multiple modules
Your profile
Bachelor degree in Computer science and 5+ years in SAP ABAP programming (Objects, WebDynpro, BAPI, RFC, BADI, User 
Exits) in ECC and S/4HANA
Proficiency in SAP development tools (SE80, SE11, SE38, LSMW, etc.)
Understanding of data dictionary, ALV reporting, and SAP Script/SmartForms/Adobe Forms
CDS (Core Data Services) views development and modelling
Basic knowledge of SAP Cloud Platform Integration infrastructure is an advantage
Basic understanding of SAP Finance modules (FI - Financial Accounting, CO - Controlling), SAP Logistics modules (MM - 
Materials Management, SD - Sales & Distribution), SAP Production modules (PP - Production Planning, QM - Quality 
Management)
Ability to translate business requirements into technical solutions
Strong understanding of incident, problem, change, and release management
Ability to create and maintain process documentation and standard operating procedures
UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools 
manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, 
and additive manufacturing machines.
Learn more...
Great career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a 
dedicated talent management process (MyNextBigStep) to boost your career.
Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide development opportunities for everyone. We offer global 
learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses.
Sustainability and innovation focus: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a 
sustainable future together.
About us
UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools 
manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, 
and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, and digitalized 
solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support.
UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R.
UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently has over 3'000 employees on over 50 sites 
worldwide.

                                    Software Engineer Expert – R&D

Workload: 100%

Location: Losone

Job type: Unlimited

Your tasks

- Develop and maintain HMI software aligned with EDM machine requirements and user experience standards.
- Comfortable handling complex mathematical and algorithmic challenges, particularly in analytical 3D geometry — a 
core requirement for geometric processing in EDM software.
- Interface with Real-Time & PLC teams to define, validate, and improve new functionalities.
- Ensure software quality through testing, documentation, and structured code reviews.
- Participate in technical workshops, cross-team validations, and support knowledge-sharing across engineering teams.

Your profile

- Master's degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or equivalent technical field.
- Proven experience in industrial software environments, at least 3 years.
- Strong background in Object-Oriented architecture, UML, and OO programming (C# / .NET); experience in HMI 
development (WPF / XAML).
- Good understanding of the full software development lifecycle, quality assurance, and Agile / Scrum methodologies.
- Structured, autonomous, and collaborative working style; customer-oriented and resilient under pressure.
- Fluent in English and Italian.

AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader 
in wire, die-sinking, and hole-drilling EDM. Its automation-ready solutions are used in mold making and the production 
of high-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance.

Great career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a 
dedicated talent management process (MyNextBigStep) to boost your career.

Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide development opportunities for everyone. We offer global 
learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses.

Sustainability and innovation focus: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a 
sustainable future together.

UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools 
manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, 
and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, and digitalized 
solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support.

UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R.

UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently has over 3'000 employees on over 50 sites 
worldwide.

I tuoi compiti

- Sviluppare e mantenere il software HMI allineato ai requisiti della macchina EDM e agli standard di esperienza dell'utente.
- Confortevoli sfide matematiche e algoritmiche, in particolare nella geometria 3D analitica — una
requisito fondamentale per la lavorazione geometrica nel software EDM.
- Interfaccia con i team Real-Time & PLC per definire, convalidare e migliorare nuove funzionalità.
- Assicurare la qualità del software attraverso test, documentazione e recensioni di codice strutturate.
- Partecipare a workshop tecnici, validazioni tra team e supporto alla condivisione delle conoscenze tra i team di ingegneria.

Il tuo profilo

- Master in Ingegneria Informatica, Informatica, o campo tecnico equivalente.

- Forte sfondo nell'architettura orientata agli oggetti, nella programmazione UML e OO (C# / .NET); esperienza in HMI
sviluppo (WPF / XAML).
- Buona comprensione del ciclo di vita di sviluppo del software completo, garanzia di qualità e metodologie Agile / Scrum.
- Stile di lavoro strutturato, autonomo e collaborativo; orientato al cliente e resiliente sotto pressione.
- Fluente in inglese e italiano.

di componenti di fascia alta, offrendo precisione, affidabilità e prestazioni svizzere.

## Software Engineer Expert - R&D
AGIE Charmilles SA

                                            AGIE Charmilles SA, Losone

                                        None Angestellte (Schweiz)

                                        None Angestellte (global)

                                                No

                                            100%

                                    Lingua:en

                                            Inserzione originale / Candidarsi

                                            Homepage

                                    Software Engineer Expert – R&D

Workload: 100%

Location: Losone

Job type: Unlimited

Your tasks

- Develop and maintain HMI software aligned with EDM machine requirements and user experience standards.
- Comfortable handling complex mathematical and algorithmic challenges, particularly in analytical 3D geometry — a
core requirement for geometric processing in EDM software.
- Interface with Real-Time & PLC teams to define, validate, and improve new functionalities.
- Ensure software quality through testing, documentation, and structured code reviews.
- Participate in technical workshops, cross-team validations, and support knowledge-sharing across engineering teams.

Your profile

- Master's degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or equivalent technical field.
- Proven experience in industrial software environments, at least 3 years.
- Strong background in Object-Oriented architecture, UML, and OO programming (C# / .NET); experience in HMI
development (WPF / XAML).
- Good understanding of the full software development lifecycle, quality assurance, and Agile / Scrum methodologies.
- Structured, autonomous, and collaborative working style; customer-oriented and resilient under pressure.
- Fluent in English and Italian.

AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader
in wire, die-sinking, and hole-drilling EDM. Its automation-ready solutions are used in mold making and the production
of high-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance.

Great career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a
dedicated talent management process (MyNextBigStep) to boost your career.

Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide development opportunities for everyone. We offer global
learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses.

Sustainability and innovation focus: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a
sustainable future together.

UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools
manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining,
and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, and digitalized
solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support.

UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R.

UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently has over 3'000 employees on over 50 sites
worldwide.

Electronic Engineer – R&D
Workload: 100%
Location: Losone
Job type: Unlimited
Your tasks
Design, develop, test, and maintain power, analog, and digital electronics for current and next-generation generator 
hardware platforms for EDM (electro discharge) machines.
Acquire and develop process control know-how on EDM machines, including troubleshooting and process analysis, 
contributing to customer/field case resolution and working closely with application development teams.
Support component homologation, database management, and purchasing activities for new and second-source components.
Collaborate with Production teams on test system development and pre-series activities.
Contribute to compliance with relevant standards throughout the hardware development lifecycle.
Your profile
Master's degree in Electronic Engineering.
Proven experience, at least 2 years, in analog, power, and digital electronics design; knowledge of VHDL and 
electronic simulation tools.
Familiarity with measurement equipment (multimeters, oscilloscopes) and programming languages (C, C++, C#, ).
Knowledge of Matlab/Simulink; FMEA and quality processes are a plus.
Methodical and rigorous approach, strong team orientation, and genuine drive for continuous improvement.
Fluent in Italian; technical English (oral and written) is required.
AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader 
in wire, die-sinking, and hole-drilling EDM. Its automation-ready solutions are used in mold making and the production 
of high-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance.

dedicated talent management process (MyNextBigStep) to boost your career.
Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide development opportunities for everyone. We offer global 
learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses.
Sustainability and innovation focus: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a 
sustainable future together.
UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools 
manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, 
and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, and digitalized 
solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support.
UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R.
UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently has over 3'000 employees on over 50 sites 
worldwide.

Electronic Engineer – R&D
Carico di lavoro: 100%
Posizione: Losone
Tipo di lavoro: illimitato
I tuoi compiti
Progettazione, sviluppo, test e mantenere la potenza, l'elettronica analogica e digitale per il generatore di corrente e di prossima generazione
piattaforme hardware per macchine EDM (electro dump).
Acquisire e sviluppare il know-how di controllo del processo sulle macchine EDM, tra cui la risoluzione dei problemi e l'analisi del processo,
contribuire alla risoluzione dei casi del cliente/campo e lavorare a stretto contatto con i team di sviluppo delle applicazioni.
Supporta l'omologazione dei componenti, la gestione del database e le attività di acquisto per componenti nuovi e di seconda risorsa.
Collabora con i team di produzione per lo sviluppo del sistema di prova e le attività di pre-serie.
Contribuisci alla conformità con gli standard pertinenti durante il ciclo di vita dello sviluppo hardware.
Il tuo profilo
Master in Ingegneria Elettronica.
Esperienza dimostrata, almeno 2 anni, nel design analogico, di potenza e di elettronica digitale; conoscenza di VHDL e
strumenti di simulazione elettronica.
Familiarità con apparecchiature di misura (multimetri, oscilloscopi) e linguaggi di programmazione (C, C++, C#, ).
Conoscenza di Matlab/Simulink; FMEA e processi di qualità sono un plus.
Approccio metodico e rigoroso, forte orientamento del team, e genuina spinta per il miglioramento continuo.
Fluente in italiano; tecnico inglese (ordinario e scritto) è richiesto.
AGIE CHARMILLES, inventore di EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), è noto come marchio premium e leader dell'innovazione
in filo, die-sinking, e foro-drilling EDM. Le sue soluzioni di automazione sono utilizzate nella fabbricazione di stampi e nella produzione
di componenti di fascia alta, offrendo precisione, affidabilità e prestazioni svizzere.
Grandi opportunità di carriera: UNITED MACHINING offre molte opportunità per quanto riguarda la crescita della carriera. Offriamo anche una
dedicato processo di gestione del talento (MyNextBigStep) per aumentare la vostra carriera.
Strumenti di apprendimento eccellenti: A UNITED MACHINING forniamo opportunità di sviluppo per tutti. Offriamo globale
strumenti di apprendimento, corsi di formazione e corsi specializzati.
Sostenibilità e innovazione: abbiamo obiettivi di alta sostenibilità e innovazione. Lavoriamo verso un
futuro sostenibile insieme.
UNITED MACHINING è uno dei principali fornitori mondiali di soluzioni complete per componenti e strumenti di precisione
produttori e l'industria dello stampaggio. Il portafoglio comprende fresatura, EDM, texturing laser, micromachining laser,
e macchine di produzione additive. Inoltre, la divisione offre mandrini, automazione, utensili e digitalizzazione
soluzioni supportate da servizi e supporto clienti senza rivali.
UNITED MACHINING include i marchi AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC e SYSTEM 3R.
UNITED MACHINING ha sede a Biel, in Svizzera, e attualmente conta oltre 3'000 dipendenti su oltre 50 siti
in tutto il mondo.

                                    Metrology Technician

Workload: 100%

Location: Losone

Job type: Unlimited

Your tasks

- Perform dimensional and functional measurements mainly within the inspection and final testing area, ensuring 
accuracy, repeatability, and compliance with quality standards.
- Execute measurements using advanced metrology systems (Zeiss, Leitz, Werth, Mahr) and related software environments 
(Calypso, Quindos).
- Define, optimize, and standardize measurement programs and inspection methods in line with AUKOM methodology and ISO 
GPS standards.
- Analyze measurement results, support root cause analysis, and collaborate with Quality, Production, and R&D to 
ensure robust inspection processes.
- Manage and continuously improve inspection-related measurement processes, documentation, and calibration activities, 
contributing to the evolution of the metrology setup.

Your profile

- Technical degree in Mechanical, or equivalent background.
- At least 3 years of experience in a metrology laboratory or quality measurement environment. AUKOM GD&T 
certification is a plus.
- Strong knowledge of dimensional measurement processes, calibration systems, and measurement standards.
- Analytical, organized, and autonomous, with strong collaboration and coordination skills.
- Fluent in Italian; English B1.

AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader 
in wire, die-sinking, and hole-drilling EDM. Its automation-ready solutions are used in mold making and the production 
of high-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance.

Great career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a 
dedicated talent management process (MyNextBigStep) to boost your career.

Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide development opportunities for everyone. We offer global 
learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses.

Sustainability and innovation focus: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a 
sustainable future together.

UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools 
manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, 
and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, and digitalized 
solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support.

UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R.

UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently has over 3'000 employees on over 50 sites 
worldwide.

Progettazione, sviluppo, test e mantenere la potenza, l'elettronica analogica e digitale per il generatore di corrente e di prossima generazione
piattaforme hardware per macchine EDM (electro dump). Acquisire e sviluppare il know-how di controllo del processo sulle macchine EDM,
compresa la risoluzione dei problemi e l'analisi dei processi, contribuendo alla risoluzione dei casi del cliente/campo e lavorando a stretto contatto con

e componenti seconda risorsa. Collabora con i team di produzione per lo sviluppo del sistema di prova e le attività di pre-serie.
Contribuisci alla conformità con gli standard pertinenti durante il ciclo di vita dello sviluppo hardware. Il tuo profilo
laurea in Ingegneria Elettronica. Esperienza dimostrata, almeno 2 anni, in elettronica analogica, di potenza e digitale
progettazione; conoscenza di VHDL e strumenti di simulazione elettronica. Familiarità con apparecchiature di misura (multimetri,
oscilloscopi) e linguaggi di programmazione (C, C\+\+, C\#, ). Conoscenza di Matlab/Simulink; FMEA e processi di qualità
sono un vantaggio. Approccio metodico e rigoroso, forte orientamento del team, e genuina spinta per il miglioramento continuo.
Fluente in italiano; tecnico inglese (ordinario e scritto) è richiesto. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventore di EDM (Electrical
Discharge Machining), è conosciuto come un marchio premium e leader di innovazione in filo, die\-sinking, e foro\-drilling EDM.
Le sue soluzioni di automazione\-ready sono utilizzate nella produzione di stampi e nella produzione di componenti di fascia alta, offrendo Svizzera
precisione, affidabilità e prestazioni. Grandi opportunità di carriera: UNITED MACHINING offre molte opportunità
per quanto riguarda la crescita della carriera. Offriamo anche un processo di gestione del talento dedicato (MyNextBigStep) per aumentare la vostra carriera.
Strumenti di apprendimento eccellenti: A UNITED MACHINING forniamo opportunità di sviluppo per tutti. Offriamo globale
strumenti di apprendimento, corsi di formazione e corsi specializzati. Sostenibilità e innovazione: abbiamo un alto
obiettivi di sostenibilità e innovazione. Lavoriamo insieme per un futuro sostenibile. UNITED MACHINING è uno dei
fornitori leader nel mondo di soluzioni complete per i produttori di componenti e utensili di precisione e la produzione di stampi
industria. Il portafoglio comprende fresatura, EDM, texturing laser, micromachining laser e produzione additiva
macchine. Inoltre, la divisione offre mandrini, automazione, utensili e soluzioni digitalizzate supportate da
servizi e assistenza clienti senza rivali. UNITED MACHINING include i marchi AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL,

di componenti di fascia alta, offrendo precisione, affidabilità e prestazioni svizzere.

futuro sostenibile insieme.

UNITED MACHINING include i marchi AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC e SYSTEM 3R.
